about.title: About Me
about.text: Passionate developer with deep expertise in JavaScript, TypeScript and modern web technologies. Skilled in creating scalable, user-friendly, and accessible applications across platforms such as desktop, mobile, browsers, smart TVs, and cloud environments. Strong problem-solving, debugging, and collaboration skills with a focus on quality, performance, and user experience.

categories.label: Languages
categories.value: JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Python*, Ruby*, Java*

categories.label: Frameworks
categories.value: React, Angular, BackboneJS, SolidJS*, Svelte*, LightningJS

categories.label: Practices
categories.value: Agile, Scrum, CI/CD, TDD/BDD, Event-driven & Async Programming, Debugging, Problem Solving

items.label: JavaScript & TypeScript
items.text: 15+ years building applications using modern frameworks and libraries

items.label: Cross-Platform
items.text: Delivered apps for web, mobile, smart TVs (Samsung, LG, Fire TV, Android TV), Chromecast, Xbox, desktop

items.label: Accessibility
items.text: 7+ years improving inclusivity and WCAG compliance using NVDA, JAWS, and screen readers

items.label: Debugging
items.text: Strong ability to troubleshoot, profile, and enhance performance in complex environments

items.label: Leadership
items.text: Agile workflows, code reviews, mentoring, and CI/CD best practices

items.name: Video Navigator
items.subtitle: Cross-Platform Streaming Application
description: Navigator application to consume video on interactive TVs (Samsung, LG, Vizio, GoogleTV), game consoles (Xbox), and streaming devices (Chromecast, FireTV). Features include Live TV, OnDemand Movies, Cloud DVR, program recording, and in-app purchases.
Supports Dynamic Ad Insertion, trick modes (play/pause, seek, restart), parental controls, and transactional OnDemand.
Accessibility via Speech Synthesis API, NVDA, JAWS (Windows), and VoiceOver (Mac).
items.role: Architecting, designing, development with accessibility support across platforms. Code reviews, mentoring, CI/CD, and maintaining design documentation.
